task_objective: Setup GitHub remote, CI/CD workflows, and automated releases
design_decisions: Used GitHub Actions for CI and Release automation.
Adopted OIDC (Trusted Publishers) for secure PyPI publishing.
Used GitHub's native release notes generator for automated changelogs.
Fixed hardcoded test data path in DuckDB engine tests to use tmp_path.
results: GitHub repository updated with automation, tests passing locally, and releasing documentation provided.
